patch.value: Extract advanced search and vectorization into installable pm package
Move semantic/hybrid search, reindex progress, embedding providers, vector stores, and search cache refresh into pm-search-advanced packages while keeping keyword item lookup core.

Keyword search remains core; semantic/hybrid/vector features are package-owned with dynamic contracts; SDK search provider APIs are preserved; package dogfood verifies install, reindex, search, health, and telemetry.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Duplicate check 2026-05-14: pm search semantic reindex vector extraction found closed search/vector implementation items plus parent pm-59gj; net-new extraction child under pm-59gj.
